title: ADULT LITERACY - 211info
text: MID-VALLEY LITERACY CENTER ADULT LITERACY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides literacy services. Offers computer basics, adult English classes for English Language Learners, workplace English and Spanish Language Literacy, preparation for GED, United States citizenship, and Certified Nursing Assistants certifications. 1850 45th Avenue NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-8pm Email (503) 463-1488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 463-1488 Michele Griffin-Campione Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. All students must be tested before starting in order to determine appropriate placement. FEES: $40 for assessment and registration, $100 for all classes per 11 week term, $40 textbooks DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Lincoln, Linn, Marion, Polk, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the East Salem Community Center on 45th Avenue between Market and Sunnyview Services: Citizenship Education Computer Literacy Training Programs English as a Second Language GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction Literacy Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-VALLEY LITERACY CENTER
